feature.name: Tasks Migration Requirements
feature.description: Document task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation for FileMaker to Supabase migration

standing_constraints: DO NOT modify backend infrastructure (database schema, API endpoints) - create change request documents instead
Follow Backend Change Protocol from CLAUDE.md for any schema/API changes
Verify Supabase table existence before documenting mappings
Document current behavior accurately without making assumptions
Include code references with file paths and line numbers
Consider fixed-price project logic in financial record generation

tasks.title: Create requirements directory structure
tasks.description: Create requirements/tasks/ directory and README.md scaffold with sections for task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation
tasks.completion_notes: Directory structure already exists at requirements/tasks/ with comprehensive README.md covering task CRUD (Task Management section), timer operations (Timer Operations section), and financial record generation (Financial Record Generation section). All supporting documentation files present: current-implementation.md, data-model-mapping.md, api-contracts.md, authorization.md, migration-plan.md, acceptance-criteria.md. Total 7 files with 140KB of documentation.
tasks.implementation_notes: Confirmed the existing 'requirements/tasks/' documentation structure already satisfied TSK0001, including 'README.md' sections for task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation plus supporting specs like 'api-contracts.md' and 'acceptance-criteria.md'. Ran 'npm run build' to ensure the project still compiled and treated warnings as pre-existing. Updated '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/tasks.json' to mark TSK0001 as completed with completion metadata, then revalidated the JSON and rechecked the key README sections; no backend or implementation code changes were made.

tasks.title: Document task CRUD operations
tasks.description: Document current task create, read, update, delete operations including FileMaker field mappings, validation rules from TASK_FIELDS in taskService.js:265-305, and API calls
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive TASK_CRUD_OPERATIONS.md documentation covering all task CRUD operations, FileMaker field mappings, validation rules, timer operations, business logic, and code references. Verified Supabase does NOT have a tasks table (only automation tables exist). Documented current FileMaker-only implementation with layouts: devTasks, dapiRecords, devNotes, devLinks. Included validation schema from TASK_FIELDS (taskService.js:265-305), all CRUD flows with code references, timer lifecycle, fixed-price project logic, and migration considerations.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation for legacy FileMaker-backed task CRUD and timer behavior, including field mappings, validation rules, API request flows, and migration considerations, delivered in '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/TASK_CRUD_OPERATIONS.md'. Updated task status metadata by marking TSK0002 complete in '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' with timestamp and notes, and verified JSON validity and that the project build still compiles. Key decisions documented include treating delete as not implemented (tasks are completed instead), confirming tasks are FileMaker-only (no Supabase tasks table), and capturing timer-specific rules like fixed-price suppression of sales record creation and 6-minute adjustment increments with code references and line numbers across 'taskService.js', 'tasks.js', 'useTask.js', and 'fileMaker.js'.

tasks.title: Document timer lifecycle and state machine
tasks.description: Document timer start/stop/pause operations, state transitions, time adjustment logic (6-minute increments), and pause time tracking from TaskTimer.jsx and taskService.js
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive TIMER_LIFECYCLE_STATE_MACHINE.md documentation covering the complete timer state machine with three states (IDLE, RUNNING, PAUSED), all state transitions, pause tracking mechanism, 6-minute adjustment increments, localStorage persistence, and integration with FileMaker. Documented timer state structure, all operations (start/stop/pause/resume/adjust) with complete flow diagrams, time calculations, pause time tracking, fixed-price project logic for sales record generation, and migration considerations for Supabase. Includes detailed code references across TaskTimer.jsx, useTask.js, taskService.js, and tasks.js with specific line numbers for all key functions and state management logic.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation of the TaskTimer lifecycle and timer state machine, covering states (IDLE, RUNNING, PAUSED), all operations (start, stop, pause, resume, adjust), time and pause calculations, fixed-price billing behavior, persistence via localStorage, and migration considerations. Added the new doc file '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/TIMER_LIFECYCLE_STATE_MACHINE.md' with concrete code references to 'TaskTimer.jsx', 'useTask.js', 'taskService.js', and 'tasks.js'. Updated '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' to mark the task complete, validated JSON, and confirmed the build compiles (noting existing unrelated warnings). Key decision: keep this change purely documentation-focused with no backend or runtime behavior modifications.

tasks.title: Document financial record generation
tasks.description: Document how timer stop triggers financial record creation, fixed-price project detection (taskService.js:108-112), customer_sales insertion, and dual-write orchestration
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive FINANCIAL_RECORD_GENERATION.md documentation covering the complete financial record generation flow from timer stop through customer_sales insertion. Documented fixed-price project detection logic (taskService.js:108-112), product name formatting (CBS:Website pattern), customer lookup/creation, dual-write orchestration via dualWriteService.js, and Supabase customer_sales table schema. Verified customer_sales table structure via SSH to supabase-db. Includes complete data flow diagrams, field mappings from FileMaker devRecords to Supabase customer_sales, error handling strategies, migration considerations with 3-phase plan, edge case documentation, and two complete example flows (hourly vs fixed-price projects). Total 600+ lines of detailed documentation with code references including file paths and line numbers for all key functions across taskService.js, salesService.js, dualWriteService.js, and financialRecords.js.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation for the timer stop to financial record generation flow, covering fixed-price project detection, customer_sales insertion logic, and dual-write orchestration from FileMaker to Supabase. Added the new doc at '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/FINANCIAL_RECORD_GENERATION.md' and referenced key logic across 'taskService.js', 'salesService.js', 'dualWriteService.js', and 'financialRecords.js' with specific line ranges, including the decision to skip sales creation when 'customers_Projects::f_fixedPrice' is set. Verified the Supabase 'customer_sales' table schema via SSH, confirmed tasks JSON validity, and ensured the project build still passes, with the important decision noted that this was documentation-only with no runtime code changes.

tasks.title: Map FileMaker devTasks layout to Supabase schema
tasks.description: Verify if Supabase tasks table exists, document FileMaker devTasks field structure, and create mapping to target Supabase schema including field types, constraints, and indexes
tasks.completion_notes: Verified Supabase tasks table does NOT exist (only automation-related tables: tasks_scheduled, tasks_paused, task_dependencies, task_executions, task_state_transitions, task_templates, task_execution_steps, task_rollback_actions). Created comprehensive FILEMAKER_DEVTASKS_MAPPING_SUMMARY.md documentation covering FileMaker devTasks layout field structure (__ID, _projectID, _staffID, task, type, f_completed, notes, DateCreated, DateModified), complete field-by-field mapping to proposed Supabase tasks table schema with UUID primary keys, foreign key relationships, indexes, constraints, triggers, and migration strategy. Documented data type conversions (boolean 0/1 to true/false, MM/DD/YYYY to ISO 8601 timestamps, FileMaker IDs to UUIDs via filemaker_id_mappings), all required indexes for performance (project_id, staff_id, organization_id, is_completed, status), constraints (NOT NULL, CHECK, FK cascades), and triggers (updated_at auto-update, actual_hours rollup from time_entries). Includes complete transformation examples, API integration points, and verification checklist with backend team requirements. Build verified successfully.
tasks.implementation_notes: Verified Supabase has no primary 'tasks' table, identified eight related task automation tables, and cross-referenced existing migration docs before completing the FileMaker 'devTasks' field mapping. Updated documentation by extending 'requirements/tasks/data-model-mapping.md' and 'requirements/tasks/current-implementation.md', and added a new comprehensive summary at 'requirements/tasks/FILEMAKER_DEVTASKS_MAPPING_SUMMARY.md' detailing the proposed Supabase 'tasks' schema, field conversions (including 'f_completed' boolean and timestamp handling), and an ID reconciliation approach via a 'filemaker_id_mappings' table. Referenced key code touchpoints for the mapping (notably 'src/api/tasks.js' CRUD flows and 'src/api/fileMaker.js' 'Layouts.TASKS = 'devTasks'') while making the explicit decision to perform documentation-only changes per the backend change protocol. Confirmed the project build succeeds (warnings only) and marked the work complete in '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/tasks.json'.

tasks.title: Map FileMaker devRecords layout to Supabase schema
tasks.description: Verify if Supabase time_entries table exists, document FileMaker devRecords field structure for timer data, and create mapping to target Supabase schema
tasks.completion_notes: Verified Supabase time_entries table does NOT exist (no timer-related tables in Supabase). Created comprehensive DEVRECORDS_SUPABASE_MAPPING.md documentation covering FileMaker devRecords layout field structure including all core timer fields (__ID, _taskID, _staffID, _projectID, _custID, TimeStart, TimeEnd, DateStart, TimeAdjust, Work Performed), calculated fields (Billable_Time_Rounded, Hourly_Rate, f_billed), and related fields from other layouts (Customers::Name, customers_Projects::projectName, customers_Projects::f_fixedPrice, Tasks::task). Documented complete field-by-field mapping to proposed Supabase time_entries table schema with UUID primary keys, foreign key constraints, indexes, RLS policies, and database triggers for billable hours calculation. Includes timestamp handling conversion (FileMaker date+time to PostgreSQL TIMESTAMPTZ), data type conversions, dual-write strategy phases, organization ID resolution, pause time tracking considerations, fixed-price project handling, and historical data migration approach. Complete with SQL schema, migration code examples, reconciliation queries, and next steps including backend change request requirements. Build verified successfully.
tasks.implementation_notes: Verified Supabase has no 'time_entries' or other timer-related tables, confirming the timer system is currently FileMaker-only and any schema work requires a formal backend change request per protocol. Documented the full FileMaker 'devRecords' layout field structure by reviewing layouts docs, financial record generation docs, the FileMaker API file, and field usage in 'billableHoursService'. Added comprehensive mapping documentation in '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/DEVRECORDS_SUPABASE_MAPPING.md' proposing a Supabase 'time_entries' schema (SQL DDL), field-by-field mappings, type conversions, constraints, RLS, triggers, and a phased dual-write migration plan. Updated the task tracker to mark TSK0006 done with timestamp/notes and confirmed the project build still succeeds with no new errors.

tasks.title: Document current dual-write mechanism
tasks.description: Document dualWriteService.js logic, withDualWrite wrapper, timer_stop operation type, and how it coordinates FileMaker + Supabase writes
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive DUAL_WRITE_MECHANISM.md documentation covering the complete dual-write service architecture, withDualWrite wrapper logic, all operation types (timer_start, timer_stop, record_create, record_update), error handling strategies, and configuration API. Documented that dualWriteService.js is DEFINED but NOT ACTIVELY USED in production - the actual timer stop flow in taskService.js:67-131 calls createSaleFromFinancialRecord() directly instead of using withDualWrite(). Includes complete flow diagrams, execution steps, decision logic in shouldCreateSupabaseRecord(), timer_stop implementation via handleTimerStopSupabaseOperation(), rollback mechanism (not implemented), retry configuration (not implemented), and convenience function stopTimerWithDualWrite(). Documented current production pattern that provides more control for fixed-price detection and conditional Supabase writes. Complete with code references across dualWriteService.js, taskService.js, salesService.js with specific line numbers, configuration examples, migration recommendations for short/medium/long-term phases, and explanation of why the service exists but isn't used (fixed-price logic needs to run before Supabase write decision).
tasks.implementation_notes: Created comprehensive documentation of the existing dual-write system, focusing on how 'dualWriteService.js' and the 'withDualWrite' wrapper coordinate FileMaker-first writes with optional Supabase writes, including operation types, decision logic, error handling, and configuration. Added the new doc at '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/DUAL_WRITE_MECHANISM.md' and captured the key implementation decision that the service is fully implemented but currently unused in production because timer-stop flows rely on direct logic in 'taskService.stopTimer()' and 'createSaleFromFinancialRecord()' for fixed-price conditional behavior. Verified the project build still succeeds and marked the task complete, with changes limited to documentation only.

tasks.title: Document financial sync reconciliation
tasks.description: Document financialSyncService.js synchronization logic, how it compares devRecords with customer_sales, and reconciliation strategies
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive FINANCIAL_SYNC_RECONCILIATION.md documentation covering the complete financial synchronization architecture between FileMaker devRecords (source of truth) and Supabase customer_sales (derived dataset). Documented all core functions: synchronizeFinancialRecords() with full/pending modes, fetchDevRecordsForDateRange(), fetchCustomerSalesForDateRange(), compareRecords() with case-insensitive matching, identifyChanges() with 2-decimal precision, createCustomerSaleFromDevRecord(), updateCustomerSaleFromDevRecord(), and getOrCreateCustomerId(). Includes sync tracking service using sessionStorage, four reconciliation strategies (full review, review-approve-sync, orphaned record handling, status check), error handling patterns, data consistency considerations (floating point precision, date normalization, customer matching), performance optimization recommendations, and migration phases for Supabase transition. Documented product name formatting logic (CBS:Website pattern), fixed-price project handling limitation (records not filtered during sync), and complete data flow diagrams. Total 650+ lines with code references including file paths and line numbers across financialSyncService.js, syncTrackingService.js, billableHoursService.js, and financialRecords.js.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation of the financial sync reconciliation system, detailing the end-to-end flow between FileMaker 'devRecords' (source of truth) and Supabase 'customer_sales', including the 8 core functions, reconciliation modes, and tracking workflow. Key updates were made by adding '.devflow/tasks/tasks-migration-requirements/FINANCIAL_SYNC_RECONCILIATION.md' with code references to 'src/services/financialSyncService.js', 'src/services/syncTrackingService.js', 'src/services/billableHoursService.js', and 'src/api/financialRecords.js', and by updating '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' to mark the task complete. Important decisions captured include case-insensitive 'financial_id' matching, consistent 2-decimal numeric comparisons, date normalization, and full-field overwrite updates, plus a critical limitation noting fixed-price projects are not currently filtered and should be skipped.

tasks.title: Define backend API endpoints for tasks
tasks.description: Specify REST API endpoints for task CRUD operations following backend API patterns (HMAC auth, error handling, validation)
tasks.completion_notes: Created comprehensive BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST_001_TASKS_API.md document specifying 12 REST API endpoints for complete task and timer operations following backend API patterns. Documented database schema for tasks and task_timers tables with complete SQL DDL including indexes, constraints, triggers, and RLS policies. Defined all 12 endpoints: POST /api/tasks (create), GET /api/tasks (list by project), GET /api/tasks/{task_id} (get by ID), PATCH /api/tasks/{task_id} (update), PATCH /api/tasks/{task_id}/status (completion status), POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/timer/start (start timer), POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/timer/stop (stop timer with financial record generation), GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/timers (list timers), GET /api/tasks/timers/active (get active timer), DELETE /api/tasks/{task_id} (delete), GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/notes (get notes), GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/links (get links). Includes complete request/response schemas, HMAC-SHA256 authentication specification, validation rules matching frontend TASK_FIELDS, business logic for timer financial record generation, fixed-price project detection, error handling with 10 error codes, testing requirements (unit, integration, performance), rollback plan, migration strategy in 6 phases, and approval checklist. Document maps FileMaker devTasks and devRecords fields to Supabase schema, preserves fixed-price logic from taskService.js:104-111, includes 6-minute adjustment increment validation, product name formatting (CUSTOMERCAPS:ProjectFirstWord), and billable hours calculation. Total 850+ lines with complete field mappings, API contracts, code references to taskService.js, tasks.js, useTask.js, and dataService.js.
tasks.implementation_notes: Created a comprehensive backend change request document at 'requirements/tasks/BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST_001_TASKS_API.md' (850+ lines) defining 12 REST endpoints for task/timer operations, two Supabase table schemas (tasks, task_timers) with SQL DDL (constraints, indexes, triggers, RLS), complete HMAC-SHA256 authentication spec, validation rules mirroring frontend logic, business logic including fixed-price project detection and financial record generation, error codes, testing requirements, rollback plan, and 6-phase migration strategy. Key decisions: (1) frontend-generated 'task_id' UUID as unique identifier alongside auto-generated DB 'id', (2) 6-minute adjustment increments enforced with CHECK constraint (adjustment_seconds % 360 = 0), (3) timer stop generates customer_sales record ONLY if project.f_fixedPrice = 0, (4) product_name formatting as 'CUSTOMERCAPS:ProjectFirstWord', (5) no task deletion in current scope (only completion), (6) pause logic client-side with final adjustment sent on stop. Verified the project build still succeeds and updated '.devflow/tasks/tasks.json' to mark TSK0009 complete with timestamp/notes.
